interactions.sharedContract: Entitlement/quota grants gate billing account, subscription, usage, and payment behaviour
interactions.dataOwnershipBoundary: Entitlement engine owns its source state; Subscriptions, invoices, payment methods, dunning may read or act only through the shared contract.
interactions.controlOwnershipBoundary: Entitlement engine controls mutation semantics; Subscriptions, invoices, payment methods, dunning controls its local reaction and must not infer missing producer state.
interactions.ownershipBoundary: Entitlement engine owns producer state; Subscriptions, invoices, payment methods, dunning owns consumer state.
interactions.failureBehaviour: Subscriptions, invoices, payment methods, dunning fails closed or remains pending when Entitlement engine proof/readiness is unavailable.
interactions.orderingRequirement: producer state/readiness is established before consumer mutation or side effect
interactions.retryIdempotencyBehaviour: retries use tenant-scoped idempotency and must not duplicate side effects
interactions.consistencyModel: read-committed platform state with explicit readiness dependency
interactions.transactionBoundary: Entitlement engine transaction is not shared with Subscriptions, invoices, payment methods, dunning; cross-capability work uses explicit handoff and compensation.
interactions.compensationBehaviour: partial consumer state is retried, redriven, or marked pending; producer-owned state is not silently rolled back by consumer failure

environmentBehaviour.dev: local composed provider or fixture dependency for discovery
environmentBehaviour.test: deterministic proof using disposable tenant data
environmentBehaviour.staging: prod-shape rehearsal with sandbox external dependencies where needed
environmentBehaviour.prod: real tenant operation with non-destructive smoke/readiness only

interactions.securityBoundary: tenant context, permissions, secrets, and provider credentials do not cross the boundary except through the declared contract
